# DAILY INSTITUTIONAL MARKET INTELLIGENCE JOURNAL
### Nexus Alpha Terminal | NIFTY 50 SMC Playbook
#### Session Date: Thursday, 2026-05-28 | Compiled: Post-Market Close

---

> ⚠️ **EXPIRY DAY ADVISORY ACTIVE** — Thursday session. Per Master Rule #3.3, all positions initiated after **14:00 IST** required 50% position size reduction or full skip due to gamma squeezing dynamics. All alerts logged in this journal were evaluated against this constraint.

---

## SECTION I — SESSION MACRO SNAPSHOT

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    NIFTY 50 — DAILY PRICE AUDIT                     │
├──────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  OPEN            │  24,050.00                                        │
│  HIGH            │  24,656.70                                        │
│  LOW             │  24,048.30                                        │
│  CLOSE           │  24,334.00                                        │
│  NET CHANGE      │  +1.18%                                           │
│  SESSION RANGE   │  608.40 pts  (HIGH - LOW)                        │
│  BODY SIZE       │  284.00 pts  (CLOSE - OPEN)                      │
│  UPPER WICK      │  322.70 pts  (HIGH - CLOSE)                      │
│  LOWER WICK      │    1.70 pts  (OPEN - LOW)                        │
├──────────────────┼──────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  MARKET REGIME   │  ✅ TRENDING_UP                                   │
│  SESSION BIAS    │  ✅ BULLISH                                        │
│  INDIA VIX       │  13.94  ✅ WITHIN SAFE THRESHOLD (< 20)          │
└──────────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Candle Morphology Interpretation
The daily candle presents a **near-perfect Bullish Marubozu with an upper shadow anomaly** — a structurally significant formation demanding careful interpretation:

- **Near-zero lower wick (1.70 pts):** The open at 24,050 was essentially the session low. This confirms **immediate institutional absorption of sell-side liquidity** at the open. No meaningful seller participation was present from the first candle. This is a classic signature of pre-positioned institutional accumulation triggering at the daily open price level.

- **Large upper wick (322.70 pts):** Price reached 24,656.70 intraday but closed 322 points off the high. This is a **Bearish Order Block formation at the intraday high zone** — a liquidity sweep of intraday BSL (buy-side liquidity) followed by a retracement. The 24,600–24,656 zone is now a **live Bearish OB candidate** for the next session and must be watched for rejection setups.

- **Positive body (+284 pts, +1.18%):** Despite the retracement from the high, the net close is constructively bullish. The structure remains intact with the close well above the open. Overall session momentum: **BULLISH CONTINUATION with caution at overhead supply.**

---

## SECTION II — VOLATILITY & RISK REGIME ASSESSMENT

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                   INDIA VIX RISK MATRIX                             │
├───────────────────────┬─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Current VIX          │  13.94                                       │
│  Safe Standard Zone   │  < 20.00  ✅ CLEAR                          │
│  Caution Zone         │  20–25    ✅ NOT TRIGGERED                   │
│  Hard Block Zone      │  > 25     ✅ NOT TRIGGERED                   │
│  Intraday VIX Spike   │  Requires > 10% surge to trigger block      │
│  Spike Block Status   │  ✅ NOT TRIGGERED                            │
├───────────────────────┼─────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  OVERALL RISK RATING  │  🟢  LOW RISK — FULL TRADING PERMITTED       │
│                       │  (Subject to Expiry Rule post 14:00 IST)    │
└───────────────────────┴─────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**VIX Narrative:** A VIX reading of 13.94 places the market firmly in the **low-fear, institutionally-controlled** regime. At this level, options premiums are compressed, spreads are narrow,
